description: Contact form submission with server-side validation and result display

browserSteps.value: window.testData = null; var formData = new FormData(document.getElementById('contact-form')); fetch('/_piko/actions/contact.Submit', { method: 'POST', body: formData }).then(function(r) { return r.json(); }).then(function(data) { window.testData = data; document.querySelector('[p-ref=result_name]').textContent = data.name || ''; document.querySelector('[p-ref=result_email]').textContent = data.email || ''; document.querySelector('[p-ref=result_message]').textContent = data.message || ''; document.querySelector('[p-ref=result_container]').style.display = 'block'; }).catch(function(e) { console.error('Fetch error:', e); });
